name: vibedeck-bridge-extension
description: Localhost TCP bridge for VibeDeck and Cursor/VS Code extension hosts.

vibedeckBridge.tcpHost.description: agentк°Җ л¶ҷмқ„ localhost bridge hostмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. мҷёл¶Җ л…ём¶ңмқҖ к¶ҢмһҘн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.commands.openLocation.description: openLocationмқ„ мІҳлҰ¬н•  optional command ID. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ кё°ліё editor open лҸҷмһ‘мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.commands.getWorkspaceMeta.description: workspace metadataлҘј мқҪмқ„ optional command ID

vibedeckBridge.commands.getLatestTermina.description: latest terminal errorлҘј мқҪмқ„ optional command ID

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.workspaceRoot.description: builtin cursor-agent providerк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  workspace rootмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ нҳ„мһ¬ м—ҙл Ө мһҲлҠ” мІ« workspace folderлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.tempRoot.description: builtin cursor-agent providerмқҳ temp worktree parent кІҪлЎңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ мӢңмҠӨн…ң tempлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.bin.description: builtin cursor-agent providerк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  cursor-agent мӢӨн–ү нҢҢмқјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. WSL лӘЁл“ңм—җм„ңлҠ” Linux мӘҪ binary мқҙлҰ„ лҳҗлҠ” кІҪлЎңлҘј л„ЈмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.extraArgs.description: builtin cursor-agent providerм—җ м¶”к°ҖлЎң л„ҳкёё CLI мқёмһҗ лӘ©лЎқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.extraEnv.description: builtin cursor-agent providerм—җ м „лӢ¬н•  м¶”к°Җ нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳ лӘ©лЎқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. нҳ•мӢқмқҖ KEY=VALUE мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.syncIgnoredPa.description: temp worktree snapshotм—җ ліөмӮ¬н•  ignored нҢҢмқј pathspec allowlistмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ ignored нҢҢмқјмқҖ ліөмӮ¬н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.trustWorkspac.description: builtin cursor-agent provider мӢӨн–ү мӢң --trust н”Ңлһҳк·ёлҘј мһҗлҸҷ м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.model.description: builtin cursor-agent provider мӢӨн–ү мӢң кё°ліё model к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мҡ°л©ҙ мһҗлҸҷ м¶”к°ҖлҘј лҒ•лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.useWsl.description: Windowsм—җм„ң cursor-agentлҘј WSL bashлҘј нҶөн•ҙ мӢӨн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.wslDistro.description: useWsl=trueмқј л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  WSL distro мқҙлҰ„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ кё°ліё distroлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.promptTimeout.description: builtin cursor-agent providerмқҳ prompt мӢӨн–ү timeout(ms)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.cursorAgent.runTimeoutMs.description: builtin cursor-agent providerмқҳ run profile timeout(ms)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

vibedeckBridge.agentBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the shared thread panel agent HTTP base URL. Leave empty to follow vibedeckBridge.agent.host/port.

vibedeckBridge.panelAutoRefreshMs.description: Auto-refresh interval for the shared thread panel in milliseconds.

vibedeckBridge.agent.autoStart.description: Start the local agent automatically after the bridge is ready. Manual launchMode disables spawning.

vibedeckBridge.agent.launchMode.description: Local agent launch strategy. auto picks go_run when the repo layout is available, otherwise manual.

vibedeckBridge.agent.host.description: Host interface for the local agent. The panel default URL follows this host.

vibedeckBridge.agent.port.description: Listen port for the local agent. The panel default URL follows this port.

vibedeckBridge.agent.repoRoot.description: VibeDeck repo or runtime root used by go_run or binary launch modes. Leave empty to infer from the extension location when possible.

vibedeckBridge.agent.binaryPath.description: Agent executable path used when launchMode=binary.

vibedeckBridge.agent.args.description: Additional process arguments passed to the local agent.

vibedeckBridge.agent.extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables passed to the local agent in KEY=VALUE form.

vibedeckBridge.agent.runProfileFile.description: Absolute RUN_PROFILE_FILE path for the local agent. Leave empty to use repoRoot/configs/run-profiles.json.

vibedeckBridge.agent.signalingBaseUrl.description: SIGNALING_BASE_URL passed to the local agent process.

vibedeckBridge.agent.readyTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for waiting until the local agent health check is ready.

vibedeckBridge.mobileBootstrap.hostOverr.description: лӘЁл°”мқј bootstrap QR/deep linkм—җ л„Јмқ„ host overrideмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л№„мӣҢл‘җл©ҙ extensionмқҙ private IPv4лҘј мһҗлҸҷ м„ нғқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
